name: TANDEM DIABETES CARE INC
business: Tandem Diabetes Care designs and sells insulin pumps (t:slim X2 and Mobi) and related supplies (cartridges, infusion sets) for people with insulin-dependent diabetes, primarily type 1 and expanding to type 2 requiring intensive insulin therapy. They also provide automated insulin delivery software (Control-IQ+) and data management platforms.
sellsTo: people with type 2 diabetes requiring intensive insulin therapy

exposures.sentence: Tandem Diabetes Care is a global leader in insulin delivery and diabetes technology, specializing in the design, development, and commercialization of advanced solutions that reduce the burden of diabetes management.

We offer products for people with insulin-dependent diabetes, including a portfolio of hardware platforms, single-use insulin cartridges and infusion sets, data management platforms and mobile applications.
Our AID systems offer users the choice of integrating with multiple CGM sensors.

catalysts.event: CE Mark approval for Tandem Mobi with Control-IQ+
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we received CE Mark approval for the Tandem Mobi insulin delivery system with Control-IQ+ technology.
In December 2025, we further expanded the availability of Mobi to Android users in the United States.

catalysts.event: Direct sales operations in U.K., Austria, and Switzerland
catalysts.sentence: We began direct sales, training and customer support activities in 2026, starting with the United Kingdom, Austria, and Switzerland, and intend to continue this transition in additional markets across 2026.
In 2026, our primary focus will be to continue increasing our sales through the pharmacy benefit with improved scalability of operations, expanded coverage and a change in the reimbursement model.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 5 million people with type 1 diabetes globally, with 2 million in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: In the geographies we serve, we estimate about 5 million people live with type 1 diabetes of whom approximately 2 million reside in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 2.5 million people in the U.S. with type 2 diabetes requiring intensive insulin therapy.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate about 2.5 million people in the United States live with type 2 diabetes and require intensive insulin therapy.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. insulin pump adoption rates: ~40% type 1, ~5% type 2.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, approximately 40% of individuals with Type 1 diabetes, and 5% of individuals with Type 2 diabetes, use insulin pump therapy.

tamClaims.claim: International insulin pump adoption estimated at ~20%.
tamClaims.sentence: Internationally, average insulin pump adoption is estimated to be approximately 20%.
